scripts.validate: node tests/run-validation.mjs && node tests/run-setup-validation.mjs && node tests/run-hand-validation.mjs && node tests/run-assignment-validation.mjs && node tests/run-hand-evaluator-validation.mjs && node tests/run-five-card-matcher-report.mjs && node tests/run-five-card-probability-report.mjs && node tests/run-attendance-probability-validation.mjs && node tests/run-seven-card-probability-validation.mjs && node tests/run-ranking-validation.mjs && node tests/run-ui-structure-validation.mjs
scripts.precompute:holdem: node tools/generate_holdem_cpp_header.mjs && g++ -O3 -std=c++17 tools/precompute_holdem_poker.cpp -o tools/precompute_holdem_poker && tools/precompute_holdem_poker holdem-poker-counts.json && g++ -O3 -std=c++17 tools/precompute_holdem_relational_grouped.cpp -o tools/precompute_holdem_relational_grouped && tools/precompute_holdem_relational_grouped holdem-relational-counts.json && g++ -O3 -std=c++17 tools/precompute_holdem_same_suit.cpp -o tools/precompute_holdem_same_suit && tools/precompute_holdem_same_suit holdem-same-suit-counts.json && node tools/build_holdem_precomputed_module.mjs
